requiredVariables.name: CEO_SUITE_STATE_ROOT
requiredVariables.rule: if present, must resolve inside repo

requiredVariables.name: ACTIVE_GOVERNED_EXECUTION_BY_DEFAULT
requiredVariables.rule: if present, value should be true or ACTIVE_GOVERNED_EXECUTION_BY_DEFAULT

requiredVariables.name: STANDARD_AGENT_CHAIN_ACTIVE
requiredVariables.rule: if present, value should be true or STANDARD_AGENT_CHAIN_ACTIVE

consistencyRules: local and VSI use C:\CEO\project-cdx as canonical active entry
Codespaces may use its mounted workspace root but must keep repo-scoped state
do not re-anchor CEO_ROOT by inference
do not read secret values while checking presence
